verses.text: Tua ciangin kikhopna inn sungah Jesuh paikik a, tua lai-ah a khut a langkhat a zaw mi khat na om hi
Jesuh gamtakhial hi, ci-in a mawhsak nuam mi pawlkhat tua lai-ah om uh a, Sabbath ni-in hih mipa a damsakkha hiam, ci-in vil gige uh hi
Jesuh in khutzaw mipa kiangah, “Hih a mailamah hong ding in,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin mite kiangah, “Sabbath ni-in bang i hih ding i Thukham in hong deih ahi hiam? Huh ding maw, gimsak ding; mi khat a nuntakna hot ding maw, thah ding; koi hong deihzaw ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi. Ahih hangin kuamah in dawnglo hi

Jesuh in hehmai tawh a kiim a pam en kawikawi a, ahi zongin a khialhna uh leh a thuphawk theihlohna uh hangin mite khasiathuai a sa zel hi. Tua ciangin a mipa kiangah, “Na khut zan in,” a ci hi. Amah in zong a khut zan a, damin a ngeina bangkik hi
Tua ahih ciangin kikhopna inn panin Farisi mite paikhia-in Herod pawlte kimkhat tawh kikhopna neipah uh a, Jesuh a thahtheihna ding uh a vaihawm uh hi.
Tua lai panin Galilee Tuili-ah Jesuh leh a nungzuite pai uh a, Galilee gam, Judea gam
Jerusalem khua, Idumia gam, Jordan galkhat, Taia khuapi kiim leh Sidon khuapi kiima om gamte in ama hihsa thute zakhin uh ahih manin, hih gamte panin mihon tampi tak, ama kiangah hong pai uh hi
Mihonte tamlua mahmah ahih manin amaute in Jesuh a nehcipgawp khaklohna dingin ama omna ding gunkuang khat a koihna dingun a nungzuite a sawl hi
Amah in cina mi tampi damsakkhin ahih manin, Jesuh a lawn'theihna dingun cina khempeuh in amah hong naih ciat uh hi
Tua laitakin mite' sunga lut dawite in Jesuh a muh uh ciangin a mai-ah pukin kiko uh a, “Nang pen Pasian' Tapa na hi hi,” a ci uh hi
Dawite in amah kua mi ahi cihna thu a genkhiat lohna dingun Jesuh in nakpi takin dawite a kham hi.
Tua lai panin a mualtung lamah Jesuh paito a, mi a deihteng ama kiangah a sam hi. Tua a sap mite ama kiangah hong pai uh a
amah in mi sawmlenih teelin, sawltakte, ci-in min a phuah hi. Jesuh in, “Kei tawh a kikhawl dingin noteng ka hong teel hi. Thu a hilh dingin zong ka hong sawl ding a
dawi hawlkhiatna ding vangliatna na nei ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua a teel mi sawmlenihte: Simon (Jesuh in a min thak dingin Peter a phuahpa
Zebedi' tapa James leh a naupa Johan (Jesuh in hih unaute pen “Vanging bang,” a cih nopna Boanerges min a phuahte
Andru, Filip, Bartholomew, Matthai, Thomas, Alfeas' tapa James, Thaddeas, Simon (gam khualpa
leh Jesuh a lehhek Iskariot' tapa Judas ahi uh hi.
ama kiangah mihonpi hong kikhawmkik zel ahih manin Jesuh leh a nungzuite in an nangawn ne theilo uh hi
A innkuanpihte in hih thu a zak uh ciangin Jesuh a la dingin hong kuankhia uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh, “Jesuh mihai suakta hi,” a kicihna thu a za uh hi
Jerusalem khua pan a hong pai Thukham hilh siate pawlkhat in, “Hihpa sungah Beelzebul lut hi. Dawimangpa in ama tungah dawi hawlkhiat theihna ding vangliatna pia hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Jesuh in ama kiangah mite samin thugentehna tawh thu hilh a, “Satan in Satan bangci hawlkhiat theih ding ahi hiam
Gam khat peuhpeuh phelnih kisuahin kido le uh tua gam kiplo ding hi
Innkuan khat peuhpeuh phelnih kisuahin kido le uh tua innkuan kipzolo ding hi
Satan leh Satan kikhenin kido le uh kipzolo ding uh a, a bei ding uh hita uh hi
Mi thahatpa hencip masa lopi-in kuamah in mi thahatpa' innsung pan a neihsate laksak zolo ding hi. A hencip khit ciang bekin laksakzo pan bek ding hi
“Tua ahih ciangin hih thu phawk un! Mihingte' mawhna leh a kampau siatnate uh kimaisak thei ding hi
Ahi zongin Kha Siangtho langpangin thu a gente in mawhna kip sukha uh ahih manin a mawhna uh kimaisak ngeilo ding hi,” a ci hi
(Mi pawlkhatte in, “Jesuh in dawi vei hi,” ci uh ahih manin hih bangin thu a gen ahi hi.)
Tua laitakin a nu leh a naute hong tung uh a, inn pualamah ngakin, Jesuh a sam dingin mi a sawl uh hi
Ama kiimah a tu mihonpite in, “Na nu leh na naute, inn pua-ah om uh a, nang hong sam uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Jesuh in, “Ka nu leh ka naute i cih kuate ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi
Ama kimkotah a tu mite en a, “Hih lai-ah ka nu leh ka sanggamte om uh hi
Pasian' deihna bangin a gamta mi khempeuh ka nu leh ka sanggamte ahi uh hi,” a ci hi.
